title: Lunglei HPC Vice Chairman Pu V. Malsawmtluanga'n Lunglei Sub-Headquarters YMA Inkhawmpui a hmanpui
content:
5026/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 27:March ni 25–27, 2026 chhunga Tlabung Licheng Suarherawt Runa Young Mizo Association (YMA) Sub-Headquarters Lunglei Inkhawmpui vawi 40-na hman chu March ni 26 (Ningani) zan khan Lunglei High Powered Committee (HPC) Vice Chairman, Lunglei North bialtu MLA Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan YMA kumpuan "Ruihhlo Do" chu Mizoram sawrkar pawhin thupui bera a neih mek a nih thu sawiin, ruihhlo do kawnga hma la tura a bika din Core Committee on Ruihhlo Do hma lakna atan cheng nuai 300 chuang sawrkarin a sen tawh thu a sawi a. Excise & Narcotics Department thuam chak nan lirthei 21 lei a nih tawh thu te, ruihhlo do kawnga beihpui thlakna 'Operation Jericho' chak taka kalpui mek a nih thu leh sawrkar kum kal mekah cheng vaibelchhe 1,047 chuang hu ruihhlo man a nih tawh thu te a sawi.

Pu V. Malsawmtluanga chuan Mizo hnam peng hrang hrangte inkarah inunauna leh inpumkhatna nghet zawk a awm theih nan sawrkarin theih tawpa hma a lak thu sawiin, Mizo hnam peng hrang hrang ṭobul ziaka vawn ṭhat theih tur buatsaih tuma sawrkarin hma a lak mek thu a sawi a. Zo nun ze mawi nunpui a, chawi san chuan aia upa zahna a ken tel thu leh mi dangte tana hriat nuam tura ṭawngkam hawihhawm hman hram hram chu Zo nun ze mawi nihphunga bet tlat a nih thu sawiin, YMA member-te chu ruihhlo laka inthiar fihlim a, theih tawp chhuaha ruihhlo do turin leh Zo nun ze mawi chawi sang a, nunpui zel turin a chah.

YMA Sub-Headquarters Lunglei Inkhawmpui vawi 40-na hi West Tuipui bialtu MLA Pi Prova Chakma pawhin a hmanpui a. Inkhawmpuiah hian hmun hrang hrang aṭanga palai riak lut 700 vel an awm a. Vawiin khan hruaitu thar thlan niin, President atan Pu K. Lalfakzuala, Vice President atan Pu Zothanzuala Hnamte, Secretary atan Pu C. Lalrindika, Assistant Secretary atan Pu H. Lalhmingthanga, Treasurer atan Pu K. Vanlalhruaia leh Finance Secretary atan Pu R. Lallawmkima te thlan an ni.

Tun dinhmunah YMA Sub-Headquarters Lunglei hnuaiah hian YMA group 11 awm mekin, YMA branch 119 a awm a. Member inchhiarna hnuhnung bera a lan danin Lunglei Sub-Headquarters huam chhungah hian YMA member mipa 33,565 leh hmeichhia 16,865, an zavaiin member 50,430 an awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: Thenzawl khelmuala Artificial Football Turf phah tur lungphum Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova‘n a phum
content:
5025/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 27th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Pu B. Lalchhanzova FCS&CA, LR&S, IPRP&S changtu Minister chuan Thenzawl Lo-Tha-Zawl Playground-a Artificial Football Turf phah tur lungphum a phum.

Minister chuan thusawiin Pathianin kan hmaah thil tha tak a daha, chu chu mihringte hian kan suangtuahnaah kan dah pha lo zawk thin a, vawiinah pawh hian kan phu loh malsawmna tam tak kan dawng a ni, a ti.

Tunlai khawvel buaina avanga tuialhthei chungchanga harsatna awm thei mai tur anga kan ngaih laiin sawrkarin theihtawpin hma a la mek reng a ni, a ti bawk.

Thenzawl leh a chhehvel khaw mipuiten he football field siam tur hi ral thlir lo a, neitu thinglung pu in vil se, tha taka hnathawh a nih theih nan thawktute lo enkawlte thleng pawhin mawh an phur a ni tih hria se a duh thu a sawi a. He thil hi awlsam tea neih theih a ni lo tih hria a, a hlutzia kan hriat a ngai a.Hmasawnna hna thawh a nihin engemaw chen khawtlangah harsatna a thlen chang a awm thin a, chungte pawh chu inhuam turin a chah a. Vawiina Artificail Football Turf siam dan tur lehkha an sem chu lo dahtha a, siam zawh a nih hunah a nih tur ang a ni em tihte thlenga lo vil zui turin mipuite a chah a ni. Mi zawng zawng huap zo ni ngei se a duh thu Pu B Lalchhanzoa chuan a sawi a. Chief Minister biala thil thleng a nih avangin kan lo tisual alawm le, tih hi a thiang lo a ni, a ti.

Minister chuan he hmun hian Thenzawl hlutna a tipung anga, tlawh chaktu an lo tam anga, Thenzawl khaw mipuite inpumkhatna a ti tha lehzual dawn a ni, a ti a. Sport hi eizawnna atana hmang tur chuan infrastucture a pawimawh rualin a infiam mite inbuatsaihna a pawimawh tel thu sawiin, “Intihsiakna mai piah lamah kan nun tihlimna tur leh insawizawina hrim hrim atana tihte pawh hi a hlu em em a ni tih hi hriat tel a ngai a ni”, a ti bawk.

Mizoram State Sports Council Secretary Pu Henry C. Lalrawnkima chuan technical report a pe a, Artificial Football Turf, Thenzawl siam nan hian Ministry of Minority Affairs, Government of India hnuaia Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK) Scheme atangin June ni 11, 2025 khan vaibelchhe 11.856 sanction dawn a ni a. Hnathawktu tur Contractor zawnna atan Open Tender chhuah a nih hnuah he hnathawk tur hian M/s Décor India, Guwahati, Assam te thlan niin, Work Order pawh ni February 24, 2026 khan pek fel an ni a, work order amount chu vaibelchhe 10.33 a nih thu a sawi.

He Project chhungah hian hna hrang hrang thawh tura ruahman a ni a. Artificial Football ground hi a dung metre 111 leh a vang metre 76-a zau tur a ni a, RCC Kerbing Wall metre 0.60-a sang a hung kual vek tur niin, Perforated pipe hmangin tui paih chhuahna siam vek a ni dawn a ni. Football Play area hi a dung metre 105 leh avang metre 70 tura ruahman niin, line pawnah free area metre 3 a awm kual vek bawk ang. Artificial Football Turf hi FIFA approved Quality 60 mm (pile height) phah tur a ni.

Football ground hi tha taka hung tur a ni dawn a, metre 2 dan zelah ban phun tur niin, a hnuai lam 0.60 metre hi brick wall a ni ang a, a chunglam 1.80 metre hi Angle iron leh Steel net hmanga hung tur a ni. Gate pathum (3) goal hnung ve veah 1.2 metre-a zau leh Pavilion hmaah 6 metre a zau dah tur a ni.

RCC Pavilion hi chhawng hnih (G+1) a sak tur niin, a dung metre 23.65 leh a vang metre 5.90-a zau a ni ang. Ground Floor-ah hian Changing Room 2 leh Toilet 2 dah niin, 1st Floor hi Pavilion atana ruahman a ni a, chair 200 vel dah theihna tur a ni ang.

Pavilion sirah RCC Gallery siam ve ve tur a ni a, Gallery hi a dung metre 225, a vang metre 6 tur a ni Ground Floor hi Parking atana ruahman niin 1st Floor hi Gallery atana ruahman a ni a, hetah hian mi 230 ve ve leng thei tura ngaih a ni.

Mipa leh Hmeichhe tana inthiarna tur Public Toilet a awm anga, PwD (Persons with Disability) te tana hman tur inthiarna 2 siam tel a ni bawk ang. Internal road/Approach-road Field panna leh a area chhung inkal pawhna kawng hi RCC-in metre 3-a zau siam vek tur a ni a. RCC Water Tank, tui litre 1,00,000 (nuai khat) leng ruahman tel a ni bawk.

He hun hi Sports & Youth Services Department Commissioner & Secretary Pu V. Lalsangliana’n a kaihruai a. Thenzawl Zone football Association Sr. Vice President Pu Thanglianchhunga leh Thenzawl South VCP Pu B. Lalremsanga ten thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: DEPUTY SPEAKER PU LALFAMKIMA'N MHIP SUB-HEADQUARTERS, KOLASIB CONFERENCE VAWI 16-NA A HMANPUI
content:
5024/2025-2026

Bairabi, 27th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Zampuimanga Hall, Bairabi-ah Mizo Hmeichhe Insuihkhawm Pawl (MHIP) Sub-Headquarters, Kolasib Conference vawi 16-na chu tluang taka neih a ni a. He hun hi Mizoram Legislative Assembly Deputy Speaker Pu Lalfamkima chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui a, Kolasib Addl. DC Pi B. Malsawmtluangi chu Khualzahawm a ni. Kumin MHIP Sub-Hqrs. Kolasib Conference thupui hi "Dikna leh rinawmna chawinun" tih a ni.

Khuallian Deputy Speaker Pu Lalfamkima chuan thu sawiin, Mizo hmeichhiate'n kawng hrang hranga hma an sawn chak thu leh, khawtlang leh sorkarah pawh dinhmun pawimawh tak tak an luah chho zel chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. "Khawtlang tha, ralmuang leh ruihhlo laka fihlim kan neih theih nan chhungkua a pawimawh hmasa ber a, chumi atan chuan nu te'n tu leh fate nungchang mawi leh tha a enkawl kawngah mawhphurhna lian tak an nei a ni," a ti. Hmeichhiate chu chhungkaw innghahna an nih angin, ruihhlo dona kawngah pawh tha thlah lova hma la zel turin nute a chah a, MHIP pawhin a pawl anga ruihhlo dona kawnga ngaihtuahna an sen zual zel a pawimawh thu a tarlang bawk.

Mizoram hmasawnna tura thil pawimawh tak, a bik taka rel rawn chuang chhuak chho mek chungchang sawiin Khuallian chuan, "Hei hian kawng hrang hrangin kan ramah hmasawnna lian tak a thlen dawn a. Heng hmasawnna lo thleng turte hi tangkai leh tha taka lo dawngsawng a, hma kan sawnpui theih nan keimahni mipuite ngei pawh kan rilru leh ngaihtuahna thlenga inbuatsaih lawk a tul hle a ni," a ti. Rel a rawn luh tak avangin sumdawnna leh eizawnna kawng thar a rawn inhawng dawn a, chutih hunah chuan mitinte kawng hrang hranga inpeihsaa awm a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

Mipui hriselna leh khawtlang hmasawnna a inzawm tlat thu sawiin, Deputy Speaker chuan damlohna a lo thlen thulha chhungkaw tana innghahna tur sorkar scheme tha tak, Mizoram Universal Health Care Scheme tangkaina tarlangin, chhungkaw tinte ngai pawimawh a inziak lut (register) vek turin kalkhawmte chu a sawm a. MHIP chu pawl tha leh pawimawh tak a nih anga vul zel turin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Khualzahawm Pi B. Malsawmtluangi, Addl. DC pawhin thu sawiin, tunlai khawvelah hmeichhiate chuan kawng hrang hrangah hma an sawn nasa hle tih sawiin, hmeichhe dinhmun inthlak danglam chho zel chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. "Politics-ah pawh VCP atanga MLA thlengin hmeichhia hmuh tur an awm ta chu hmasawnna ropui tak a ni a, Mizoram Legislative Assembly-ah ngei pawh hmeichhia pathum ngawt mai kan nei chu chhuanawm ka ti hle a ni," a ti.

Khualzahawm chuan infiamna (sports) lamah pawh boxing, football leh volleyball-ah te hmeichhiate an larsar hle tih tarlangin, "Eizawnna kawng hrang hrangah pawh mipa tih chi anga ngaih thin two-wheeler taxi, auto rickshaw leh sumo khalh thlengin hmeichhiain an ti ve thei ta a, sumdawnna kawngah pawh sa sat thlengin hmeichhia an awm ta chu a lawmawm takzet a ni," a ti bawk. Hmasawnna tur tam tak hmeichhiate'n an la neih thu tarlangin, mahni hmeichhe puite initsik lova inchawimawi tawn leh inkaitho tawn turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Vawiin inkhawm hi MHIP Sub-Hqrs. Kolasib President, Pi C. Laldinpuii'n a kaihruai a. Hla sakho leh sunna hun te hman a ni a. District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) atangin mipui zirtirna (awareness program) tha tak buatsaih a nih bakah, special item hmuhnawm tak tak entir a ni bawk. He Conference-ah hian Kolasib District chhung atangin MHIP member an tel tha hle.

Nimin (March 26) lamah khan Conference pual hian Rorelna hun leh Hruaitu thar thlanna hun hman a ni tawh bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: GOVERNMENT SAIHA COLLEGE, SIAHAAH INDIA SIPAIA ṬAN TUMTE TAN KAWNG INKAWHHMUHNA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
5023/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 27 March, 2023:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:30A.M. khan Government Saiha College, Siaha Seminar hall, College Vaih-ah India Sipaia ṭan tumte tan Agnipath scheme chungchang kawng inkawhhmuhna hun hman a ni.

Army Recruiting Office, Aizawl buatsaih vawiin hun hmannaah hian Dr. Lalnunfela Chhangte, SDC, Deputy Commissioner’s office Siaha chuan fuihna thu a sawi a, Army Recruiting Office, Aizawl official bakah Pu Z. Lalnghaktluanga, SDC, Siaha leh Government Saiha College zirlai leh National Cadet Corps (NCC) member-te an tel.

Sipaia ṭan tumte tan online-a dilna thehluh dan video an enho bakah sipai nunchan hlimthla an thlirho bawk. Online registration hi April 1, 2026 thleng a tih theih a, chiang zawka hre duh tanwww.joinindianarmy.nic.inah en theih a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM STATE PROJECT MONITORING COMMITTEE CHUAN REVIEW MEETING NEI
content:
5022/2025-2026

Ni 27thMarch, 2026: Ni 25 March,2026 nileng khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee chuan Pu R. Lal Rinawma, IRS(Rtd), Vice Chairman, MSPMC hovin  tun hnaia Project hrang hrang an endikte thlir hona, Review Meeting, Planning & Programme Implementation Department Conference Hall-ah an nei a.

Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee hian tun kum (April,2025- March,2026 chhung) kallai ah hian Project hrang hrang 72 an endik tawhin, vawi 82 lai inspection nei hian an feh chhuak tawh a. Chung zinga Project 16, tun hnaia an endikte report tawi an thlir ho a, rel ngai leh bawhzui ngai pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi hona hun an hmang a. Review meeting hi session hnih ah thenin, 1st session-ah project 3 leh 2nd session-ah project 3 an lo endik tawhte a hmalakna tur chhawpchhuahte bawhzui a nih dan thlir letna hun hman a ni.

1stSession-ah heng projects-

(1) Mizoram State Super Specialty Cancer & Research Centre, Zemabawk.

(2) Aizawl City Centre, New Market

(3) Multipurpose Ground, High School Field

2ndSession-ah heng projects-

(1) Improvement of Ramrikawn to NH-54 via Sakawrtuichhun

(2) Agriculture Growth Centre, Tuikual South bakah

(3) Mega Egg Production Farm, Thenzawla din tur chung changa thlirlawkna hun hman a ni bawk.

Heng hmasawnna hnathawh kal meka Nodal Department, Executing Department leh Contractor-te a mahni hun zelah meeting-ah hian kovin, hnathawh kal mek leh MSPMC-in rawtna alo siam tawhte bawhzui anih dan report an pe a. MSPMC chuan heng hmasawnna hnathawh kal mek te chak zawk a kalpui dan tur leh a rang lama mipui chhawr theih tura a puitlin ngei theihna tura tul hrang hrangte an sawipui a ni.

title: Fisheries Department Secretary-in Tamdil tlawh
content:
5021/2025-2026

27th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Fisheries Department Secretary, Er. Lalrothanga, MES chuan Tamdil a tlawh a. Forest Department te nen Tamdil chungchang leh a tihchangtlun dan turte sawiho a ni. Tamdil ah hian lei lut a tam hle a, dil luanchhuah na lam a tui put ru te enfiah in a siamthat dan tur te sawiho ani.

Saitual District-in sangha thar chhuah lamah hma a sawn theihna turin Fisheries Department hmunhma te en fiah a ni a, sangha chi siamna leh dil lo awm tawh te thawm that a ngaih tawh thu sawiho a ni. Hei bakah hian Fisheries Department farm hi sangha chi siam chhuah leh khawi nan chauh ni lovin, zirlai leh sanghakhawitute tan zirtirna hmun pawimawh tak a nih theih dan a sawi a ni.

Fisheries Department Secretary chuan Fisheries Department hi ecotourism lamah pawh thawh hlawk tak leh sum thawkchhuak tam thei tak ni in a ngai a. Khuarel thil hmang tangkai chung leh tih hmasawnna kawng leh a humhalh na lam kawnga,  tourism tih hmasawn na lama entawn tlak leh tangkai tak tur ni in a ngai a, District Fisheries Development Officer’s Office  tlawh in a hmunhma te endik in, tih changtlun dan awmthei te sawiho ani. Hemi ni vek hian Khawzawl Tuisen Phai zau Leilet neitute nen a inkawm ho in,  tuikhuah siam dan turte sawiho ani a. Fisheries Department hnuaia mimal Sangha chi siamna a tlawh nghal bawk. Hemi hnu hian Champhai District a mimal  Sanghachi siamna hmun a tlawh nghal ani.

title: Champhaiah Workshop-cum-Capacity Building of stakeholders under Mission Vatsalya neih a ni
content:
5020/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 27th March 2026:Vawiin khan I & PR Auditorium, CHANEM Building-ah District Child Protection Unit, Champhai District buatsaihin Programme on Workshop-cum-Capacity Building of stakeholders under Mission Vatsalya hman a ni a, he hunah hian Pi Lalrinkimi Hmar, District Child Protection Officer, Champhai chuan inlawmna thu sawiin programme hman a nih chhan te a sawi a ni.

Champhai SP Pu Lokeshwaran R chuan thu sawiin hetiang workshop pawimawh tak buatsaih a ni hi lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Naupang venhimna kawnga hnathawh thil pawimawh tak a nih avangin NGO hrang hrang te leh hetiang lam kaihhnawih lama Sorkar department te thawhhona ṭha neih a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk. Hetiang lama inzirtirna ṭha zawk neih belh zel a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Pu Vanlalruata, Judicial Magistrate leh Principal Magistrate, Juvenile Justice Board, Champhai District pawhin thu sawiin naupang tan a thawktute chu naupang te tana dawnsawn nuam leh an harsatna lo chhawk zangkhai thei tura lo inbuatsaih thin turin a chah a, Naupang tan a thawktu te mawhphurna hrang hrang a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Juvenile Justice (Care and Protection of Children) Act, 2015 and Protection of Children from Sexual Offences Act, 2012 (JJ Act & POCSO Act) chungchang sawihona hun neih a ni a. Police department, Excise department, Health department, naupang kaihnawiha thawktu hrang hrang te leh naupang home hrang hrang a thawktute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: P&E Minister Pu F. Rodingliana’n MHIP Saitual Sub-Headquarters khawmpui vawi-3 na a hmanpui
content:
5019/2025-2026

Saitual, the 27th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Ngopa Jubilee Hall-ah, MHIP Saitual Sub-Headquarters chuan “Mite tanpui” tih thupui hmangin khawmpui vawi 3-na an hmang a, P&E Minister Pu F. Rodingliana chu khuallian niin, Pi Ngurmawii Sailo, Vice President, MHIP General Headquarters, Aizawl chu khual zahawm a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian Pu F. Rodingliana chuan thu a sawi a, MHIP Saitual Sub-Headquarters Conference vawi-3 na an thleng thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, MHIP chu Mizoram tan malsawmna an ni, a ti. Khuallian chuan Mizoramah khualzin an pung zel tih sawiin, hotel tha leh zu in tur duh vanga Mizoram tlawh an ni lo a, Mizo hnam zemawi leh inhmangaih tawnna chu an hmuh duh ber zawk a ni tih sawiin, hemi kawnga tan la turin kalkhawm te chu a fuih nghal a ni.

Minister chuan Aizawl khawpui chhungah hmeichhia te chu an dinhmun ina a zir loh vanga inzuar te leh mipa hnathawk thei lo home leh jail-ah te tam tak an awm tih a sawi a, tam tak chu nu leh pa inthen, enkawltu mumal nei lo te an ni, a ti. Thalaite nun siam tha turin hmeichhiate chu an pawimawh hle tih a sawi a, Jail awm ngai lo khawpin MHIP te chu tan la turin a fuih a ni.

Khuallian chuan Mizo thuam hrang hrang puan chei te leh kawr chei te chu chawi nung zel tura tan la turin kalkhawmte a fuih a, sawrkar pawhin Mizo thuam chawi lar turin hma an lak mek tih a sawi. MHIP te chu an programme apiangah Kristian kan nihna hre reng a, Zonun zemawi vawng nung tur zel turin a chah a, MHIP Saitual Sub-Headquarters khawmpui chu midang tana malsawmnaa alo chan theih nan a duhsakna sang ber a hlan bawk a ni.

Vawiin khawmpui hi Pi Lalbiaktluangi, President, MHIP Saitual Sub-Hqtrs chuan a kai hruai a, Pi Lalnunpuii, Khawkawn Branch-in hunserh a hmang. Thusawi hi khuallian Minister Pu F. Rodingliana, khual zahawm Pi Ngurmawii Sailo, Vice President, MHIP General Headquarters leh Pi Lalhriatpuii, MJS, Senior Civil Judge cum Secretary, District Legal Services Authority, Aizawl District hnen atangin ngaihthlak a ni. Inkhawm thawh hnihna hi Pi Lalsangkimi, Vice President, MHIP Saitual Sub-Hqtrs chuan a kai hruai a, Pi C. Rosangkimi, Fin. Secy chuan lawmthu sawina hun a hmang a ni. Saitual Sub-Headquarters Conference vawi 3-na hi 26-27th March, 2026 chhunga hman niin, March ni 26, 2026 khan Zo Zan hman a ni tawh bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: MJA-in General Conference 2026 hmang
content:
5018/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 27 March, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram Journalist Association (MJA) chuan I&PR Auditorium, Treasury Square-ah, kum 2026 General Conference an hmang a. Pu Ramchuana, Secretary Finance Department chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui a ni.

He hunah hian khuallian, Pu Ramchuana, Secretary, Finance Department chuan thu sawiin, MJA-ten 2026 General Conference an hmang thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Chanchinbumite pawimawhna chu hrethiam a, an hmasawnna atana sawrkar hmalakna hrang hrangte tarlangin, thawhhona tha tak an neih zel a beisei thu a sawi a. MJA chu pawl hlun leh pawimawh tak a ni tih sawiin, a chhunga pawl mite pawh, ram rawngbawlna hna pawimawh tak chelhtute leh thil thlengte thlifim a, mipuite hriatna tizautu an ni tih inhre reng turin a chah a. Khawvel changkang zelah, Chanchinbu hlutna chu an kutah a awm tlat tih hre reng tura fuihin, Conference chu inhlan thar leh intuai thar nan te, hlim leh hlawkthlak taka hmang theuh turin duhsakna a hlan nghal bawk a ni.

MJA General Conference Chawhma inkhawm hi Pu C. Lalhmachhuana, MJA Gen.Hqrs Vice President-in kaihruaiin, kalkhawmte lawmna thu a sawi a. Pu K. Zothanpara, GS, Gen.Hqrs hnen atangin Kum  2025-26 inkara pawl inrelbawl dan General report ngaihthlak niin, Pu Lalrinmawia Sailo, Gen.Hqrs  Treasurer hnen atangin sum hman dan report ngaihthlak a ni a. Pu C. Lalrambuatsaiha, MJA  President-in thusawiin, Pension thlahna hun a kaihruai nghal a. Nikum, 2025 December ni 25-a MJA  member boral ta, Ezrela Dalidia Fanaipari Fanai sunna hun hman a ni a. Pu Lalnunzira Chawngthu  Secretary, Gen.Hqrs chuan lawmthu sawiin chawhma hun hi a khar a ni. Chawhnu lamah hian rorel leh kum 2026-28  atana MJA hruaitu thar turte thlanna hun hman nghal a ni.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PU C. LALSAWIVUNGA’N VAPHAI COMMUNITY HALL-AH USP GINGER, GREENHOUSE CLUSTER LEH SAPTHEI CHIN KHUHHAWNG
content:
5017/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 27th March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10:00 khan Pu C Lalsawivunga, Minister, Horticulture Department chuan Vaphai Community Hall-ah USP Ginger, Greenhouse Cluster leh Sapthei chin khuhhawnna hun a hmanpui a, Greenhouse cluster Sesih Zau, Vaphaia Greenhouse enkawltu tur mi 21 leh sapthei ching tura thlan mi 40-te nen hun hman a ni.

Minister Pu C Lalsawivunga chuan Ministry of DoNER – in Unique Selling Proposition atan a thlan hnuaiah sawhthing thar tamna ber Champhai District-ah sawhthing sawngbawlna tur a ruahman chu kalpui mek a ni a, Ginger hub hi Mualkawiah din tum niin, Spoke pathum Vaphai, Tualcheng leh Zotlangah te din tum a ni tih a sawi. Vaphai khuain tiang duhsakna hi an la dawn ngai loh thu sawiin Horticulture Department chungah lawmthu a sawi a. He duhsakna hi thawhrimna, taimakna leh rinawmna a chhanlet tur a nih thu a sawi a, hlawhchham mai mai lo tur leh hlawhtlinpui ngei turin kalkhawmte a fuih a ni. Animal Insurance chungchang sawi telin tun hma a Vawk pakhat a Cheng 2000 a insure ngai ṭhin kha, tunah chuan State Matching Share (SMS) in 15% chauh chawiin Cheng 292 a insure a nih theih thu a sawi lang bawk.

He hun hi Pu CH Lalmuanpuia, Horticulture Director chuan kaihruaiin thu a sawi a, USP for Ginger atan Raw material a tam thei ang ber thar turin a fuih a. Sawhthing sawngbawlna (spoke leh hub) hi Champhai district-ah hmun liah Mualkawi, Zotlang, Vaphai leh Tualchengah te bun a nih tur thu a sawi a, intodelha taima taka theihtawp chhuah a tul thu a sawi bawk.

Pi Lalrinchhani District Horticulture Officer Champhai chuan Technical Report pein RKVY DPR hnuaia Greenhouse Cluster Sesih Zau, Vaphaia Greenhouse 25 lai sak chhoh a nih theih nana Dept hmalakna te a sawi a. Greenhouse pakhat hi 100 sq.m zel niin, kum tluana thlai ṭha taka thar theih nan scheme dang te nen chhun fin (converge) niin Mission for Integrated Development in Horticulture scheme aṭangin Geolined Water Tank, Battery Operated Sprayer, Plastic Crates, NPK Fertilizer, Thlai Chi te pek an ni tih a sawi a. RKVY PDMC atangin an Greenhouse theuha dah tur drip irrigation fit sak tur an nih bakah pipe roll hnih theuh pek an nih thu a sawi a. Sawrkar leh Department ten beiseina sang tak neiin kuthnathawktute chu hlawhtlinpui nana hmang theuh turin a chah a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian line department te'n a lem nen hmalak tawhnate an tarlang a, February, 2026 thla chhunga target zawh hman a ni em tihte ena sawiho a ni.

Meeting kaihruaitu District Bawrhsap chuan Line Department te'n an hmalakna leh harsatna an tawh an tarlan te chu ngaihthlak sakin, Ni 14th April, 2026 hmaa hnate zawh a nih theih nan theihtawpchhuaha tan la turin Line Department-te a chah a ni.

Vawiin hian Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0 kharna 14th April, 2026 a hman dan tur chungchang sawiho a ni bawk.

title: PIB Press Tour Team from Punjab and Himachal Pradesh Calls on Mizoram Governor at Lok Bhavan
content:
562/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 27th March, 2026:A team of eight journalists from Punjab and Himachal Pradesh, participating in a PIB Press Tour organised by the Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, Government of India, met Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), at Lok Bhavan in Aizawl today.

During the meeting, the Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh underscored Mizoram’s significant strategic importance, despite its relatively small population and compact geographical area. He pointed out that the state is uniquely positioned at the tri-junction of India, Myanmar, and Bangladesh, making it a key player in India’s Act East Policy. Governor highlighted the cordial relations Mizoram maintains with its neighbouring countries, which have contributed to a largely peaceful border atmosphere with few major incidents. Reflecting on the state’s history, he recalled that although Mizoram experienced periods of unrest in the past, the historic Mizoram Peace Accord of 1986 marked the beginning of enduring peace and stability. He described Mizoram as one of India’s most literate states, having been officially recognised as the country’s first fully literate state, and popularly known as the “Ginger Capital of India.” The Governor also spoke about the impressive pace of development and progress across multiple sectors in the state.

Focusing on infrastructure, he termed the 51.38 km Bairabi-Sairang New Railway Line - inaugurated by Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi on September 13, 2025 - a game changer for Mizoram. He informed the team that the project is set to be extended further southward over 200 km to Zorinpui in southern Mizoram. This extension will connect with the Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project (KMMTTP), eventually linking up to Paletwa and Sittwe Port in Myanmar. Such enhanced connectivity, he noted, is expected to usher in transformative socio-economic development not only for Mizoram but for the entire Northeast region and the country at large. On the issue of border security, the Governor acknowledged that Mizoram’s proximity to international borders makes it vulnerable to attempts at drug smuggling. He assured that the government remains highly vigilant and is committed to taking all necessary steps to prevent illegal cross-border activities, including drug trafficking and other unlawful transactions. He further added that as a predominantly tribal and Christian-majority state, Mizoram greatly benefits from the constructive influence and active role of the Church, the Young Mizo Association (YMA), and other NGOs in upholding social discipline and harmony.

The members of the PIB Press Tour Team shared their positive impressions from their visit to Mizoram. They expressed deep appreciation for the state’s scenic natural beauty and praised the local residents for their commendable civic sense - particularly their strict adherence to traffic rules, minimal use of vehicle horns leading to low noise pollution, and overall law-abiding, courteous behaviour, which they described as exemplary.

The team had arrived in Mizoram on March 22 and visited several important sites, including the newly operational Sairang Railway Station, Thenzawl Solar Plant, Akashvani Aizawl, PIB Office, DDK Aizawl, and the popular tourist spot at Reiek. They also interacted with senior officials of the Department of Information & Public Relations (I&PR) and members of the Mizoram Journalists’ Association (MJA). The team is scheduled to return tomorrow.

The Press Tour Team is led by Dr. Vikram Singh, Media & Communication Officer, PIB Jalandhar, and is being hosted by Dr. Rajeev Lourembam, Head of Office, PIB Aizawl.

Attachment

title: Punjab leh Himachal Pradesh atanga lokal PIB Press Tour Team te'n Larsap an kawm
content:
5015/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 27th March, 2026:Sawrkar laipui Ministry of Information & Broadcasting buatsaiha Sawrkar project hrang hrangte zirchiang tura Mizoram tlawha rawn zin, PIB Press Tour Team, Punjab leh Himachal Pradesh atanga lokal member 8 te chuan vawiin khan Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) chu Lok Bhavan-ah hmuin an kawm.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Mizoram chu state te leh mihring tlemna ni mah se, ram pahnih Myanmar leh Bangladesh kar cheha awm anih avangin India rama hmun pawimawh tak leh, Act East Policy-a hmun langsar tak chang pha anih thu a sawi a. Ramri lehlama chengte nena inlaichinna tha tak nei anih avangin boruak a ralmuan thu leh buaina lian tham chhuak a awm meuh loh thu a sawi a. Tunhmain Mizoram chu ram buai ni mah se, Mizoram Peace Accord, 1986 ziah hnuah state ralmuang tak anih tak thu sawiin, tunhnaiah India rama ziak leh chhiar thiam vekna state hmasa ber leh sawhthing khawpui 'Ginger Capital of India' a puan anih thu a sawi a; hmasawnna dangte pawh chak taka kalpui chhoh zel anih thu a sawi bawk.

Larsap chuan September 13, 2025 a Prime Minister-in a hawn tak km 51.38 a thui Bairabi-Sairang New Railway Line chu danglamna lian thlentu a ni tih sawiin, Zorinpui thleng turin chhim lamah km 200 chuang a thui siam chhunzawm tum anih thu leh, Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project (KMMTTP) va pawha, Paletwa leh Sittwe Port, Myanmar nena thlunzawm tum a ni, a ti a. A zawh fel hunah chuan Mizoram mai bakah hmarchhak state leh India ram pum tana hmasawnna lian thlentu anih dawn thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu ramri depa awm anih avangin ramri kaltlanga ruihhlo tawlh pawh man tur a awm fo thu leh sawrkarin dan lova ramri kaltlanga ruihhlo tawlh leh sumdawnnate theihtawp chhuaha a do zel dawn thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu tribal tamna leh christian sakhua vuantu tamna anih thu sawiin, Kohhran, YMA leh NGO dangte'n khawtlang leh state inrelbawlnaah hmun pawimawh tak an chan thu a sawi bawk.

PIB Press Tour Team-te hian an cham chhunga Mizoram an hmuh dante leh hmasawn zel tura pawimawh ni a an hriatte Larsap an sawipui a. Mizoram chu mawi an tih thu leh traffic dan tha taka zawm a nite, bengchheng ngaimawh tur a awm lote, khua leh tuite'n inthununna tha neia dan an zawm tha chu entawntlak an tih thu an sawi bawk.

Press Tour Team-te hian March ni 22 khan Mizoram lo thlengin Sairang Railway Station, Thenzawl Solar Plant, Akashvani, PIB Office, DDK Aizawl leh khualhip nasa Reiek te an tlawh a, I&PR hotute leh MJA member-te an kawm a. Naktuk hian an haw ang.

PIB Press Tour Team hi Dr. Vikram Singh, Media & Communication Officer, PIB Jalandhar chuan rawn hovin, Dr. Rajeev Lourembam, Head of Office, PIB Aizawl chuan a tawiawm a ni.

title: SIAHA DISTRICT-A VC PARUK BY-ELECTION NEIH TURA FINAL ELECTORAL ROLL TLANGZARH A NI
content:
5013/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 27, March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10:30AM khan DC Mini conference hall, Siahaah Village council paruka inthlan ṭhatnaa (by election) hman tur final electoral roll chu Assistant District Election Officer leh Additional DC nibawk Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan a tlangzarh.

Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan AERO leh Political party aiawh kal khawmte chu lawmthu hrilhin, draft electoral roll hi March 10, 2026-ah tlangzarh anih thu leh claims & objection hi March ni 20, 2026 thleng thehluh theihna hun hawn a nih thu a sawi. Tlawmngai pawl, political party, Assistant Electoral Registration Officer leh Election branch-te tel lo chuan final electoral roll hi tlangzarh theih a nih loh thu Pu Abraham Beirazi Khithie chuan sawiin, ‘an thawhrimna leh thawhhona ṭhat vanga tlangzarh theih a nita chu lawmthu a sawi bawk.’

Inthlan ṭhatna (by election) neihna tur khuate chu general seat vek niin, chungte chu - Meisavaih East (seat 2), Thosai (seat 1), College Vaih II (seat 1), Noaotlah III (seat 1), Tipa V-III (seat 1) leh Khaikhy (seat 1) a ni a, final electoral roll hi January 1, 2026 behchhana siam niin hemi huam chhunga vote nei awmzat chu 2521 (mipa 1179, hmeichhia 1342) niin, chhungkua 670 an ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian party hrang hrang aiawh, AERO leh Election branch staff-te an tel a, ADEO hian party tinte chu final electoral roll copy khat ṭheuh a sem nghal a, lawmthu sawina a neia hun hman tihtawp a ni.

title: Data for Development Workshop Buatsaih
content:
5012/2025-2026

Aizawl, 27th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Legislative Assembly Conference Hall-ah, Data for Development chungchangah Workshop pawimawh tak neih a ni.

He Workshop hawnna inkhawm hi Pu B. Lalrinhlua, Director, Economics & Statistics in a kaihhruai a, Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Commissioner & Secretary, Planning & Programme Implementation Department chuan khuallian niin he Workshop hi a hmanpui a ni.

Chairman, Pu B. Lalrinhlua chuan Welcome Speech leh Keynote Address pe in Khawvelin Statistical Data pawimawhna a hriatchhoh zel thu leh India ramah pawh Integrated of Statistical Data ngaih pawimawh chhoh zel a nih thu a sawi a, thla thar April 2026-ah hian India ram pumpuiah Data Integrated of Statistical chungchanga inrawnkhawmna pui tham tak (Summit) neih a nih dawn thu sawiin ,he inrawnkhawmna atana kan State mamawh kan sawi chhuah ve tur atan he workshop hi buatsaih a nih thu a sawi.

Khuallian Pu Vanlaldina Fanai chuan Workshop-a lo telte chibai bukin Data chungchangah felfai leh tha zawka vawn chhoh zel kan mamawh hle tih sawiin, Finance leh Accounts lam ten Budget atana code kan neih ang hian kan data te hian a theih ang zawn zelah unique identifiers emaw, national leh international classification awm thei ang zel kan zawn a, kan hman zel hi pawimawh hle a ni a ti. Tun hnaiah Ministry of Statistics & Programme Implementation (MoSPI) hi a tang em em a, State tin ten Official Statistics Quality tha tak neih a, State tin te kan data comparable zawk nei thei turin tan a lak nasat thu a sawi bawk. Khual lian chuan Department leh agency tin te hi data neitu zawk an nih thu leh Economics & Statistics chu a luh khawmna mai a nih thu leh Department dangte tello chuan data tha a neih theih loh thu Department tin kalkhawmte a hrilh a. Kan State GSDP rawn hril chhuaktu chu Department tin te data min rawn pek khawm atanga chhut a nih thu a sawi bawk. ICT leh Science & Technology Department te nen tun lai thiamna hmanga data dah khawmna tha (storage & management) siam leh neih kawngah pawh Economics & Statistics nena thawhho chhoh zel a pawimawh thu a sawi.

Pi Mary Lalrinchhungi, Jt. Director, Economics & Statistics kaihhruaina hnuaiah Power-point Presentation neih zui nghal niin, ‘Harmonisation of Statistical Datasets’ tih chungchang Pi Lalhmangaihsangi, Asst. Director, Economics & Statistics-in Presentation a siam leh ‘Using Administrative Data for Governance : Linking Departmental Data at State level’ tih chungchang Pi R. Lalhlimpuii, Informatics Officer, ICT-in Presentation a siam chu thlirhova ngaih thlak a ni. Statistical Data darhsarh tak, in anglo tak tak kan neih tih bova, Department hrang hrangin Data inang tlang (One State One Statistic), tha leh rintlak, lakhawma dah khawmin, State-in tangkai taka kan hman tura neih pawimawhzia leh chutiang nitura nasat zawka tan lak a tulzia leh tan lak dan tur kawngResource Person-te Presentation atang hian zirchhuah a ni. Heng Presentation-te hi sawiho zui nghal niin a tul anga Central Sorkar lama la thlen leh tur a ni ang.

Pu H. Lalnunzuala, Dy. Director, Economics & Statistics in Vote of Thanks sawiin he workshop hi tin a ni.

Attachment

title: Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan Directorate of Cashewnut & Cocoa te leh Spices Board of India te nen inkawmna hun hmang
content:
5011/2025-2026

27th March, 2026 :Nimin khan Kochi, Kerala-ah Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare changtu Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan Directorate of Cashew nut & Cocoa hotute leh Spices Board of India te an pisa-ah tlawhin, inkawmna hun an hmang.

Directorate of Cashew nut & Cocoa hi Government of India, Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare hnuaia awm an ni a, an Director Dr Femina leh a staff te’n Minister hi zing dar 11-ah an lo dawng sawng. He meeting-ah hian Dr Femina chuan presentation te pe-in, Mizorama Cocoa that theih dan te sawifiahin loneitute hmasawnna tur atan uar taka cocoa ching ve turin Minister chu a lo sawm a; hemi kawngah hian Government of India chuan kawng hrang hrangah tanpuina pek an inhuam thu a sawi.

Hemi ni vek chawhnu dar 12:30-ah Spices Board of India (Ministry of Commerce & Industries, Government of India) hotute nen meeting nei lehin, an Secretary Pi P. Hemalatha chuan Minister a lo dawngsawng. Spices crop lamah Mizoram hmasawnna tur hrang hrang a awm thute leh a bikin Mizo hmarcha (Mizo Birds Eye Chilli)-ah market demand a that thu lo sawiin nasa lehzual zawka thar chhhuah a nih theih nan Government of India leh Mizoram Sawrkar te’n thawhhona tha zawk neih chhoh zel ni se tih a ni. Spices Board of India hotute nen hian chawhlui an kil nghal bawk.

Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata hi Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department atangin Secretary Pi Ramdinliani; Consultant Pu Tlangtimawia Zote leh ADAO Pu Lalrinzuala te’n an tawiawm.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN THENZAWL PWD ROAD DIVISION A HAWNG
content:
5010/2025-2026

Thenzawl the 27th March 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan PWD Complex, Thenzawlah Thenzawl PWD Road Division a hawng. Pu B. Lalchhanzova, I&PR Minister leh Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, MLA ten Chief Minister hi a tawiawm.

Thu sawiin Chief Minister chuan, PWD tana ni chhinchhiahtlak, Thenzawl mipuite tana chanchin lawmawm, Mizoramin hma kan sawn zelna kawnga kan tangkaipui tur Thenzawl PWD Road Division thar kan hawng thei ta a. Sorkar pawh kan lawm hle a ni.

Mizoramin kum 20 zet rambuai kan tawrh avangin hmasawnna lamah kan hnufual bik a, Infrastructure-ah te, Industry leh Investment lamah te state dangte kan phak lo hle a. Kan road density te hi state dangte nena khaikhinin a la hniam bik hle a. India ram road density chawhrual hi km 100 biala km 116 zel a nih laiin Mizoramin kawngpui a neih zat chu Km 100 bialah Km 46.37 chauh a la ni a. India ram average zatve pawh kan la phak lova, hnathawh tur hi kan la ngah hle a ni.

Thawh tur a tam a, hma kan la nasa a. Hna a pun a, thawktu lam kan pun si loh chuan kan kal chak thei si lova. Chak zawka hna kan thawh theih nana pawimawh tak pakhat chu Thenzawl Division thar leh Biate Sub Division thar hawn hi an ni.

Enga ti nge Thenzawlah kher, CM bial a nih vang em ni? Tih zawhna a awm thei a. Vawi tam tak kan lo sawi tawh thin angin Thenzawlah hian PEACE CITY din tur a ni a, Master Plan kan siam mek a. SASCI atangin Peace City chhunga kalpui turin Greenfield City Project kan thehluh tawh bawk a. Tourism lam project lian tak tak, Ropeway te, Vanva lui khuah te, Lau project te, Heliport te, Sericulture P3 Unit te leh thil dang dang kalpui kan tum mek bawk a. Neihloh khua hi Disaster thil avangin hmun danga sawn tumin hma kan la mek bawk si a. He lai velah hian PWD khawih chi project hi tam tham tak a rawn piang dawn a. Chuvang chuan, Thenzawla Division hawn hi thil tul tak a ni.

Thenzawl Sub-division hian Aizawl – Thenzawl – Lunglei kawng, Mizoram State Highway pawimawh ber a enkawl mek a. Kawng pawimawh dang Thenzawl - Buarpui a enkawl bawk a. Hna thar lo awm tur ngaihtuah tel miah lo pawh ni ila, he Division thar hian thawh tur a ngah sa em em tho a ni, a ti a. Office thara thawktute leh PWD office hrang hranga thawktute duhsakna hlanin, a hnathawhte leh an ruahmannate chuan kan ram hmakhua a hril a ni tih hre chung a, theihtawp chhuaha lo thawk zel turin a chah a ni.

Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, MLA pawhin thusawiin, sorkar hi inrenchem takin bul kan tan a, hmathlir thui tak nei chungin Chief Minister-in min kaihruai a, hun reilote chhungin hmasawnna thar chi hrang hrang kan hmu chho ta a. Thenzawl PWD Division thar pawh hi chung zinga mi chu a ni, a ti.

Pu B. Lalrinliana,Thenzawl Jt. VC aiawh pawhin thu a sawi a, niminah Thenzawl damdawiinah Ultrasound khawl thar a rawn thleng a, vawiinah PWD Road Division thar kan hawng a, chawhnu lamah hian Lo Tha Zawla phullem phahna lungphum kan phum dawn bawk a. Thenzawl hian thil tha kan dawng nasa a, sorkar chungah kan lawm a ni, a ti.

A hawnna inkhawm hi Pu V. Lalsangliana, Commissioner & Secretary, PWD in a kaihruai a, Rev. T. Thuamlianan hunserh a hmang a, Er. H. Zoramliana, E-in-C, PWD chuan report a pe a ni. Thenzawl Road Division thar atan hian EE  post 1, JE post 2, UDC post 2, leh a dangte sorkarin a siam tawh a, post thenkhat lak phalna pek an ni tawh a, thawktu awmsate siam remin April ni 1 atang hian mipuite dawr theih an ni ang.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER INAUGURATES THENZAWL PWD ROAD DIVISION
content:
561/2025-2026

Thenzawl, 27 March 2026:The Chief Minister, Pu Lalduhoma, today inaugurated the Thenzawl PWD Road Division at the PWD Complex, Thenzawl. He was accompanied by Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister for Information & Public Relations, and Pu T. Lalhlimpuia, MLA.

In his address, the Chief Minister described the occasion as a significant milestone for the Public Works Department and a moment of joy for the people of Thenzawl. He stated that the establishment of the new Thenzawl PWD Road Division would contribute meaningfully to Mizoram’s continued progress.

He noted that Mizoram had lagged behind in development due to two decades of insurgency, particularly in infrastructure, industry, and investment. The state’s road density remains considerably lower than that of other states. While the national average road density in India stands at 116 km per 100 sq. km, Mizoram has only 46.37 km per 100 sq. km. Even reaching the national average remains a challenge, and much work still lies ahead.

The Chief Minister emphasized that with increasing developmental activities, there is a pressing need to strengthen the workforce and administrative capacity. The creation of the Thenzawl Division and the new Biate Sub-Division is therefore a crucial step toward enhancing efficiency and accelerating development work.

Addressing possible questions on why Thenzawl was chosen, the Chief Minister reiterated that Thenzawl is being developed as a “Peace City,” with a Master Plan currently underway. A Greenfield City Project under SASCI has also been proposed. In addition, several major projects are planned or in progress in the area, including tourism initiatives such as ropeways, development of Vanva riverfront, Lau project, heliport, sericulture P3 unit, and relocation plans for Neihloh village due to disaster concerns. Given the scale of upcoming PWD-related works in the region, the establishment of a full-fledged division in Thenzawl is both timely and necessary.

Encouraging the officials and staff of the new office and the PWD at large, the Chief Minister urged them to carry out their duties with dedication, keeping in mind that their work and planning play a vital role in shaping the future of the state.

Pu B. Lalrinliana, representing the Thenzawl Joint Village Council, also spoke at the event. He expressed gratitude to the government, noting that Thenzawl has recently received several developmental benefits, including the arrival of a new ultrasound machine at the local hospital, the inauguration of the PWD Road Division, and the upcoming foundation laying of Artificial Turf at the Lo Tha Zawla playground.

The inauguration programme was chaired by Pu V. Lalsangliana, Commissioner & Secretary, PWD. Rev. T. Thuamliana delivered the invocation, and Er. H. Zoramliana, Engineer-in-Chief, PWD, presented a report.

For the newly created Thenzawl Road Division, the government has sanctioned 1 Executive Engineer post, 2 Junior Engineer posts, 2 Upper Division Clerk posts, along with other supporting staff. Recruitment for some posts has already been approved, and with the redeployment of existing staff, the office is expected to become fully operational and serve the public from 1 April 2026.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP-IN TUIALHTHEI DINHMUN ENFIAHIN FILLING STSTION TLAWH
content:
5009/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 27th March 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga tuialhthei dinhmun enfiahin Filling Station hrang hrangte a hmunah kalin a tlawh.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan tuialhthei lei leh hralh chungchangah khauh zawka kalpui angaih thu a sawi a. Lawngtlai district tana lo thleng tuialhthei leh eirawngbawlna gas hi hmun dang leh ram dangah a chhuah kan remti lo, ram chhunga cheng mipui (consumer) te hi dah pawimawh hmasak ber tur a ni, a ti. Kawnga thang mek pawh a thlenna tur hmun thleng lova hruaikawi leh khawih chingpen a awm loh nan chak taka hma lak anih thu a sawi a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan tuialhthei (POL) ah Stock 8000 Litres chinah bura pekchhuah phal a nih loh thu sawiin, Litres 5000 chinah permit hmanga pekchhuah tawh tur a nih thu Filling Station neitute hi a hrilh a ni.

Lawngtlai khawpui chhungah petrol leh diesel dinhmun a tha thawkhat hle a, March ni 27, 2026- a Lawngtlaia diesel leh petrol dinhmun chu:-

1. Mavula Filling Station - Diesel ( 3700) Petrol ( 2000)2. F. Rothuama Filling Station - Diesel ( 20000) Petrol (7400)3. Mizo Fed Filling Station - Diesel ( 17000) Petrol ( 15000)4. B. Sangchema Filling Station -Diesel ( 1500) Petrol ( 4000)

Bawrhsap hi Pu David Lalrinawma,Addl. DC, Pu Lianchhuma Chinzah, DCSO, leh Pu Ng. Lalchamliana, OC, ten an tawiawm a ni.

title: ‘Ekta Diwas Painting Competition 2026’
content:
5008/2025-2026

27th March, 2026 :Sadar Vallabhbhai Patel-a piancham vawi 150-na puala Art & Culture Department leh Mizoram Art Development Society ten an buatsaih ‘Ekta Diwas Painting Competition 2026’ chu 26thMarch 2026 (Ningani) khan Govt. Mizo High School, Chanmari, Aizawlah tluang tak a neih a ni.

He Painting Competition-ah hian a tel turte chu an kum zat azirin Category hrang hrang pali (4),Kum 13 hnuai lam, kum 14 – 18, kum 19 – 25 leh kum 26 chin chung lamahthen niin‘Unity in Diversity’tih thupui hmangin intihsiakna hi buatsaih a ni.

Chawhma dar 10 atanga chawhnu dar 2 thleng intihsiakna hi neih a ni a, tlai lam dar 3:00-ah Result puan leh lawmman semna hun hman a ni. Lawmman semna hun hi Pi Zirsangzuali, Deputy Director, Art & Culture Department chuan kaihruaiin Category hrang hranga lawmman dawngtute a puang a, Pu F. Lalthanmawia, Joint Director, Art & Culture Department chuan pawisa fai leh Certificate hlanin intihsiak lawmman a sem a, Pu Vanlalhuma Singson, Archaeologist, Art & Culture Department chuan lawmthu sawiin he Painting Competition leh lawmman semna hun hi khar a ni.

Category hrang hranga lawmman dawngtute:
